ValidationRule.description: Lightning Recurring Events with Activity Group set cause Event_Process to create approval-bound Event_Registration__c rows for every materialized occurrence. The RRULE cannot be edited via API; block at insert so the platform can't extend the series.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), Subject = "Evening Hike at James T Slavin", ISPICKVAL(Activity_Group__c, "Hiking") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Recurring events (Repeat) cannot be combined with an Event Type / Activity Group. Create one Event Registration per occurrence, or remove the Activity Group from this recurring event.
